## Type of Change
- [ ] **Frontend**: UI components, animations (GSAP/Framer), or styling.
- [ ] **Backend**: API endpoints, MongoDB schema, or Socket.io.
- [ ] **AI/Gemini**: Prompt engineering, itinerary logic, or AI Chat updates.
- [ ] **Documentation**: README updates or setup guides.
- [ ] **Chore**: Maintenance, dependencies, or workflow templates.

---

## Quality Checklist
- [ ] **AI Validation**: If changing AI logic, I have verified the Gemini 2.0 Flash output is stable and formatted correctly.
- [ ] **Real-time Check**: I have confirmed WebSockets (Socket.io) are functioning correctly for live features.
- [ ] **Mobile Responsiveness**: UI changes have been tested on mobile, tablet, and desktop views.
- [ ] **Code Standards**: My code follows the project's style guidelines and uses clean variable naming.
